query:
-- Add fleet roles to users table
ALTER TABLE users MODIFY COLUMN role ENUM('user', 'admin', 'insurer', 'assessor', 'panel_beater', 'claimant', 'platform_super_admin', 'fleet_admin', 'fleet_manager', 'fleet_driver') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user';

-- Add insurer selection fields to fleets table
ALTER TABLE fleets 
ADD COLUMN preferred_insurer_id INT NULL COMMENT 'Link to tenants table if insurer is on KINGA',
ADD COLUMN preferred_insurer_name VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT 'Insurer name (whether on KINGA or not)',
ADD COLUMN preferred_insurer_contact VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT 'Contact email/phone',
ADD COLUMN insurer_is_on_kinga TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Flag to indicate if insurer uses KINGA';

-- Add claim linkage to maintenance_records table
ALTER TABLE maintenance_records
ADD COLUMN related_claim_id INT NULL COMMENT 'Link to claims table if this maintenance is claim-related',
ADD COLUMN is_claim_related TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

-- Add approval workflow to service_requests table
ALTER TABLE service_requests
ADD COLUMN requires_approval TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
ADD COLUMN approval_status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
ADD COLUMN approved_by INT NULL COMMENT 'fleet_manager user ID',
ADD COLUMN approved_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN rejection_reason TEXT NULL,
ADD COLUMN submitted_by INT NOT NULL;
